title: psittacanthus roldanii
intro: Psittacanthus roldanii, also known as the 'Red Stinkwood', is a species of flowering plant native to Mexico. The plant has been traditionally used in herbal medicine, and its medicinal properties include anti-inflammatory and antioxidant effects. The health benefits of Psittacanthus roldanii include its potential to help reduce fever, alleviate respiratory issues, and act as an antiseptic. Herbal preparations of Psittacanthus roldanii are often made by infusing the leaves in hot water or using the bark in decoctions, and are traditionally used to treat various ailments.
